## Open Questions

All three original questions have been answered by the user:

- **Q1 (Memcached Operator Helm chart)** â†’ OCI registry at GHCR: `oci://ghcr.io/c5c3/charts` via a `c5c3-charts` HelmRepository (confirmed by `architecture/docs/09-implementation/07-ci-cd-and-packaging.md` lines 305â€“354)
- **Q2 (Default ClusterIssuer)** â†’ Self-signed ClusterIssuer
- **Q3 (Kustomization includes infrastructure/)** â†’ Yes, include `../infrastructure/`

**No remaining open questions.**

---

## Summary

Create the FluxCD infrastructure deployment manifests under `deploy/` for the CobaltCore development stack. This includes HelmRepository sources for five upstream registries (cert-manager, mariadb-operator, ESO, OpenBao, and the C5C3 OCI chart registry), HelmRelease definitions for four operators (cert-manager with a self-signed ClusterIssuer, MariaDB Operator, Memcached Operator, ESO) with production-ready values and dependency ordering, MariaDB Galera and Memcached instance CRs, and a Kustomize integration file. OpenBao's HelmRelease is excluded (CC-0009 scope).

## Scope

**Included:**
- 5 HelmRepository CRs in `deploy/flux-system/sources/` â€” `cert-manager` (`https://charts.jetstack.io`), `mariadb-operator` (`https://mariadb-operator.github.io/mariadb-operator`), `external-secrets` (`https://charts.external-secrets.io`), `openbao` (`https://openbao.github.io/openbao-helm`), `c5c3-charts` (`oci://ghcr.io/c5c3/charts`, type: `oci`)
- 4 HelmRelease CRs in `deploy/flux-system/releases/` â€” cert-manager, MariaDB Operator, Memcached Operator, ESO â€” with `dependsOn` chain and production values (`interval: 30m`, `install.crds: CreateReplace`, `upgrade.crds: CreateReplace`, `upgrade.remediation.retries: 3`)
- Self-signed ClusterIssuer bundled with cert-manager HelmRelease (post-install)
- MariaDB Galera CR (`deploy/infrastructure/mariadb.yaml`) â€” `k8s.mariadb.com/v1alpha1`, 3 replicas, Galera enabled, MaxScale, metrics
- Memcached CR (`deploy/infrastructure/memcached.yaml`) â€” `cache.c5c3.io/v1alpha1`, 3 replicas, anti-affinity, PDB, monitoring
- `deploy/flux-system/kustomization.yaml` referencing `sources/`, `releases/`, and `../infrastructure/`

**Excluded:**
- OpenBao HelmRelease and bootstrap scripts (CC-0009)
- ESO ClusterSecretStore and ExternalSecret CRs (CC-0009)
- `make deploy-infra` / `make teardown-infra` targets (CC-0010)
- Chainsaw E2E tests for infrastructure health (CC-0010)
- Valkey and RabbitMQ operators (YAGNI for Keystone-first strategy)
- Keystone Operator HelmRelease (CC-0017)
- Production OpenBao PKI ClusterIssuer (CC-0009)

flowchart TD

        S4["HelmRepo: openbao\nGitHub Pages"]
        S5["HelmRepo: c5c3-charts\noci://ghcr.io/c5c3/charts"]
    end

    subgraph releases["deploy/flux-system/releases/"]
        R1["HelmRelease: cert-manager\n+ self-signed ClusterIssuer"]
        R2["HelmRelease: mariadb-operator"]

        R4["HelmRelease: memcached-operator"]
    end

    subgraph infra["deploy/infrastructure/"]

        I2["Memcached CR\n3 replicas, PDB"]
    end

    K["deploy/flux-system/kustomization.yaml"]

    S1 --> R1
    S2 --> R2
    S3 --> R3
    S5 --> R4

    R2 -->|"dependsOn"| R1
    R3 -->|"dependsOn"| R1
    R4 -->|"dependsOn"| R1

    R2 -.->|"operator manages"| I1
    R4 -.->|"operator manages"| I2

    K -->|"references"| sources
    K -->|"references"| releases
    K -->|"references"| infra
```

flowchart LR
    CM["cert-manager\n#40;base layer#41;"] --> MDB["MariaDB Operator"]
    CM --> ESO["External Secrets Operator"]

    MDB -.-> MDBCR["MariaDB Galera CR"]
    MC -.-> MCCR["Memcached CR"]
```

## Key Components

- **`deploy/flux-system/sources/cert-manager.yaml`**: HelmRepository â€” `https://charts.jetstack.io`, `interval: 1h`, API `source.toolkit.fluxcd.io/v1`
- **`deploy/flux-system/sources/mariadb-operator.yaml`**: HelmRepository â€” `https://mariadb-operator.github.io/mariadb-operator`, `interval: 1h`
- **`deploy/flux-system/sources/external-secrets.yaml`**: HelmRepository â€” `https://charts.external-secrets.io`, `interval: 1h`
- **`deploy/flux-system/sources/openbao.yaml`**: HelmRepository â€” `https://openbao.github.io/openbao-helm`, `interval: 1h`
- **`deploy/flux-system/sources/c5c3-charts.yaml`**: HelmRepository â€” `oci://ghcr.io/c5c3/charts`, `type: oci`, `interval: 1h` (serves memcached-operator chart)
- **`deploy/flux-system/releases/cert-manager.yaml`**: HelmRelease in `cert-manager` namespace, chart version `>=1.0.0`, no dependencies (base layer), includes post-install self-signed `ClusterIssuer`
- **`deploy/flux-system/releases/mariadb-operator.yaml`**: HelmRelease in `mariadb-system` namespace, chart version `>=0.30.0 <1.0.0`, `dependsOn: cert-manager`, metrics + webhook enabled
- **`deploy/flux-system/releases/external-secrets.yaml`**: HelmRelease in `external-secrets` namespace, chart version `>=0.9.0`, `dependsOn: cert-manager`
- **`deploy/flux-system/releases/memcached-operator.yaml`**: HelmRelease in `memcached-system` namespace, chart `memcached-operator` from `c5c3-charts` sourceRef, chart version `>=0.1.0 <1.0.0`, `dependsOn: cert-manager`
- **`deploy/infrastructure/mariadb.yaml`**: MariaDB CR (`openstack-db`) in `openstack` namespace â€” `k8s.mariadb.com/v1alpha1`, Galera 3-replica, MaxScale 2-replica, 100Gi `ceph-rbd`, metrics enabled
- **`deploy/infrastructure/memcached.yaml`**: Memcached CR (`openstack-memcached`) in `openstack` namespace â€” `cache.c5c3.io/v1alpha1`, 3 replicas, 1024MB, 4096 max connections, soft anti-affinity, PDB minAvailable 2, monitoring exporter
- **`deploy/flux-system/kustomization.yaml`**: Kustomize file referencing `sources/`, `releases/`, and `../infrastructure/` for single-command `kubectl apply -k deploy/flux-system/` deployment

### Corrections from codebase research

Two details refined from the user's draft:

1. **Memcached CRD API group**: `cache.c5c3.io/v1alpha1` (not `memcached.c5c3.io/v1alpha1`) â€” confirmed from the fake CRD at `internal/common/testutil/fake_crds/memcached-operator/memcached.yaml` and the envtest integration test at `internal/common/testutil/envtest/integration_test.go:48`.

2. **Memcached-operator HelmRepository**: Named `c5c3-charts` (not a separate `memcached-operator` repo) pointing to `oci://ghcr.io/c5c3/charts` with `type: oci` â€” this is the shared OCI registry for all C5C3-owned charts, per `architecture/docs/09-implementation/07-ci-cd-and-packaging.md` lines 305â€“354. The HelmRelease references this via `sourceRef.name: c5c3-charts`.
